case_title: PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY VS GHILOTTI BROS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHILOTTI BROS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,555.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
